rulings.Case Title: KEN JUE VS. KATE MERRIGAN et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Motion For Terminating Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, March 19, 2012, line 4. PLAINTIFF KEN JUE's Motion For Terminating Sanctions. Deny. 1) Motion is premature, filed mar-13-2013 same date reply due, 2) No evidence re "notice of entry" compelling discovery order. = (501/REQ)
